designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a green faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: alien composite shell, grown-metal surfaces. Palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits. Alien design language: semi-organic, flowing conduits, chitinous panels, grav skirt glow. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting the hull material of a green armored frontline combat vehicle. The surface is a deep moss-metal alien composite shell, manifesting as intricate interwoven layers of grown-metal, resembling hardened biological tissue and metallic fibers that blend seamlessly. Fine, glowing green/teal emissive conduits trace organic, web-like patterns across the surface, pulsing with internal energy, reminiscent of alien vascular systems beneath a tough exoskeleton. Subtly integrated alien industrial details include micro-vents arranged in hexagonal clusters, recessed power couplings with bio-luminescent edges, and ultra-fine etched symbols hinting at an unknown script, all rendered without perspective or baked lighting, ensuring a perfectly tiling texture.

Generate a seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet showcasing a durable, alien composite hull for a frontline combat vehicle, presented without perspective or baked lighting. The primary material is a deep moss-metal, formed from rugged, grown-metal plates with a slightly irregular, hammered-like finish, suggesting immense strength and resilience. Integrated alien industrial surface details include robust, multi-layered panel lines, heavy-duty hexagonal fastenings, and intricate arrays of green/teal emissive conduits that glow intensely from within recessed channels, appearing as conduits for raw power. Subtle, yet complex, alien technological glyphs are subtly embossed into the thicker plate sections, alongside miniature fluid transfer ports and sensory arrays that blend perfectly into the overall structure, emphasizing a functional and battle-hardened aesthetic for a perfectly tiling texture.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
